variables.name: GOTIFY_POSTGRES_SERVER
variables.description: Server where the Gotify PostgreSQL database is located.

variables.name: GOTIFY_POSTGRES_USER
variables.description: User used to connect to the Gotify PostgreSQL database.

variables.name: GOTIFY_POSTGRES_PASSWORD
variables.description: Password used to connect to the Gotify PostgreSQL database.

variables.name: GOTIFY_POSTGRES_DATABASE
variables.description: Name of the Gotify PostgreSQL database.
